related.name: NUMBERS
related.teaser: Monad is the point before all division — the radiant seed, the single flame from which the ten thousand things unfold.

related.name: XVII. The Star
related.teaser: The Star is the light of renewal — a cosmic beacon, pouring hope into the waters of the soul.

related.name: ☿ Mercury
related.teaser: Mercury is the quicksilver axis — trickster of thought, breath of inspiration, messenger between…

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Tsukuyomi
related.teaser: Tsukuyomi embodies moon, hunt, wilderness — under Moon; in Cancer, Sagittarius.

related.name: VII. The Chariot
related.teaser: The Chariot drives the soul through waters of life, guided by will and balanced by opposing forces.

related.name: z
related.teaser: Edge, Weapon of the will, Breakthrough

related.name: ♋ Cancer
related.teaser: Cancer is the lunar tide — mother’s embrace, ocean of feeling, mirror of psyche.

related.name: ᛚ Laguz
related.teaser: Laguz is the river of night — the tide that teaches by feel.

related.name: XVIII. The Moon
related.teaser: The Moon is the dream-lens of the unconscious, a shimmering path of illusion and initiation.

related.name: Oshun
related.teaser: Sacral is the womb of becoming — water’s embrace, desire’s tide, the dance of creation.
